description:
An Independent Engineer at a technical advisory firm needs to verify the guaranteed Year 1 Performance Ratio (PR) of a proposed 20 MW utility-scale solar plant. Write a PySAM Python script to model the 20 MW tracking PV system using NREL's Pvwattsv8 module and calculate the Performance Ratio (PR) as a decimal.

System Parameters:
- DC System Capacity: 20000 kW
- Module Type: 0 (Standard)
- Array Type: 2 (1-Axis Tracking)
- DC to AC Ratio: 1.25
- System Losses: 14.08 %
- Inverter Efficiency: 96.0 %
- Weather Data: Use any available TMY weather file from the SAM solar_resource directory (path recorded in /home/ga/.SAM/solar_resource_dir.txt).

The Performance Ratio is defined as (Annual Energy [kWh] / System Capacity [kW]) / (Annual POA Insolation [kWh/m²] / 1.0 kW/m²). Annual POA Insolation must be calculated by summing the 8,760 hourly Plane-of-Array irradiance values (W/m²) and dividing by 1000.

Save the final computed metrics to /home/ga/Documents/SAM_Projects/pr_calculation_report.json. The JSON must contain the keys: 'system_capacity_kw', 'annual_energy_kwh', 'annual_poa_insolation_kwh_m2', 'performance_ratio', and 'weather_file_used'.
